A samscar (samskara) is an element of [[angst]] or the [[shadow]] where someone has unprocessed emotions making them seemdivided upon themselves


Alternatively samscars can be seen as a distortion of the [[Agent-Arena relationship]] rather than an aspect of [[angst]].

Samscars are the mechanism of [[Foreign Entrapment]]

[[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Samscars]][[sn:Samscars]][[Category:Foreign entrapment]]
[[sn:Samscars]]==See Also==
* [[Foreign entrapment|Foreign enstuckment]]
==References==
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
